name: task-github
description: GitHub adapter for task-worker Issue Tree projection/import, manual or worker dispatch, PRs, and closeout.

interface.shortDescription: Project task-worker graphs into GitHub delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: Uses a compatible task-worker as the provider-neutral execution engine, projects complete work graphs to GitHub Issue trees, and owns labels, pull requests, checks, review, merge, and closeout. Existing Issue trees can be imported for manual delegation or worker execution; setup and read-only diagnosis remain usable without the execution dependency.
defaultPrompt: Use $define to project a task-worker definition into a linked GitHub Issue tree.
Use $import to bind an existing Issue tree with manual or worker dispatch.
Use $start to claim and load a legacy or projected issue.
Use $status to inspect current task state.
Use $orchestrate only for worker dispatch; manual dispatch must never create local worker runs.
Use $done or $merge to close out work through gear-gated PR or FF merge paths.
